formulas.name: Coulomb's Law
formulas.variables: F: Electric force, q₁, q₂: Electric charges, r: Distance between charges, ε₀: Electric constant
formulas.notes: When two point charges are stationary and not accelerating

formulas.name: Electric Field Intensity due to a Point Charge
formulas.variables: E: Electric field intensity, k: Coulomb's constant, q: Electric charge, r: Distance from the charge
formulas.notes: When the charge is stationary and not accelerating

formulas.name: Electric Field due to a Dipole
formulas.variables: E: Electric field intensity, k: Coulomb's constant, p: Dipole moment, r: Distance from the dipole, θ: Angle between r and p
formulas.notes: When the dipole is stationary and not accelerating

formulas.name: Potential due to a Point Charge
formulas.variables: V: Electric potential, k: Coulomb's constant, q: Electric charge, r: Distance from the charge
formulas.notes: When the charge is stationary and not accelerating

formulas.name: Potential Difference
formulas.variables: ΔV: Potential difference, V₁: Electric potential at point 1, V₂: Electric potential at point 2
formulas.notes: When the charges are stationary and not accelerating

formulas.name: Electric Potential due to a Dipole
formulas.variables: V: Electric potential, k: Coulomb's constant, p: Dipole moment, r: Distance from the dipole, θ: Angle between r and p
formulas.notes: When the dipole is stationary and not accelerating

formulas.name: Electric Potential Energy of a System of Charges
formulas.variables: U: Electric potential energy, q: Electric charge, V: Electric potential
formulas.notes: When the charges are stationary and not accelerating

formulas.name: Electric Field due to a Uniformly Charged Sphere
formulas.variables: E: Electric field intensity, k: Coulomb's constant, q: Electric charge, r: Distance from the sphere, r₀: Radius of the sphere
formulas.notes: When the sphere is stationary and not accelerating
